data.body: Plan-review attestations for all 3 tickets read as unknown_scheme under this clone's trust root (new op-cert scheme registry; pre-existing HMAC attestations don't certify locally). Claim gate requires fresh review. Launched 3 parallel 'rebar review-plan' runs (epic 2141, story A a3d7, story F ff6f). overlap_enabled=true so each does a store-wide overlap pass (slow, ~10-20min). Awaiting results before claiming.
